note: Copy this file to local_forum.private.json and fill it with your local demo posts. Do not include private user data or unlicensed media. The private file is ignored by Git.

moments.author: 本地演示用户
moments.content: 这里可以填写你本地演示用的授权内容，不会提交到公开仓库。

comments.author: 本地评论示例
comments.content: 评论内容也应避免真实隐私和侵权素材。
